content.problemStatement:
Nice work on building your first project using C. We have curated many more projects for you to build.

Note that this is a beta course and we would love to hear any feedback on how we can improve this project, content or anything else.

Please use the star button on the right hand side to provide feedback.

And then, let's build a few more (and bigger) projects.
content.outputFormat:
Print exactly the following text (including line breaks):
Nice work on building your first project using C. We have curated many more projects for you to build.

Note that this is a beta course and we would love to hear any feedback on how we can improve this project, content or anything else.

Please use the star button on the right hand side to provide feedback.

And then, let's build a few more (and bigger) projects.

solution.approach: The problem does not require any computation. The program simply prints a fixed multi‑line message exactly as specified. No input is read, and no processing is needed.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – constant time to output the fixed string.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a constant‑size string is stored.
